audit_meta.document_title: Convergeo Strategic Master Plan v1.0 ("The Mountain")
audit_meta.supersession_note: docs/plan/00-decisions.md (LOCKED 2026-07-06) intentionally supersedes this document's tech-stack decisions (D18-D24) and cites it directly ('per Master Plan L2/Q25'). Tech-stack conflicts are in most cases documented, intentional supersessions rather than defects.
access_limitations: Live API host api.vergeo5.com:443 -> proxy egress 403 this session (could not independently re-probe HTTP).
Supabase MCP mcp.supabase.com:443 -> proxy egress 403 + OAuth unavailable (no live SQL this session).
Live/DB facts are inherited from same-day foundation probes (2026-07-18) and attributed as such; repo-only facts are labelled PARTIAL for production behaviour per contract.

facts.fact: 60 days to MVP; ~$2K bootstrap budget; 1 founder + AI; 5yr super-app vision.
facts.note: 60-day/4-phase timeline superseded by D7 (beta ~8wks after Phase-3 prompts; quality gate beats calendar) + 16-mountains model. Budget/solo-founder+AI carried forward (D6, CLAUDE.md).

facts.fact: Hybrid revenue: small commission + optional subscription tiers.
facts.note: Commissions live (commission_rates 9 rows, foundation). Subscription billing flagged OFF (paid_tiers=false; 0 subscription code) — deferred by D3.

facts.fact: Variable commission by category: 5% electronics, 8% home goods, 10% fashion/beauty, 12% services, 5% event tickets.
facts.note: D4 expands to 9 rates (adds supplies 3%, groceries 5%, default 8%, free-events 0%). Foundation shows commission_rates=9 rows (consistent with D4 superset). Exact live values NOT_AUDITABLE (Supabase blocked this session).

facts.fact: Onboard vendors first with free listings for 3-6 months (supply-first).
facts.note: D3 'Free-only at launch'; paid_tiers=false live (foundation). Aligned.

facts.fact: Tiered subscriptions Free/Bronze(K99)/Silver(K249)/Gold(K499); Q4 also names Platinum.
facts.note: Deferred by decision (D3: billing module flagged off; scope fence 'vendor subscription billing OUT of v1'). Internal doc conflicts: Q4 'Platinum' vs Layer2 'Gold top' (D3 resolves Gold-top, Platinum future); Free cap 20 (doc) vs 30 (D3).

facts.fact: Event ticket service fee 5-10% (5% initial).
facts.note: D4 = event tickets 5%, free events 0%. Config present (row count); live value NOT_AUDITABLE.

facts.fact: Free delivery above minimum order value (e.g. orders over K200).
facts.note: D16 'free delivery >=K200 within Lusaka'. delivery_zones=3 rows (foundation). Live threshold value NOT_AUDITABLE.

facts.fact: Budget under K50,000 (~$2,000 USD) bootstrapping.
facts.note: D6 <=$50/mo infra. Constraint carried forward. (Doc break-even cites $62/mo total elsewhere — minor internal inconsistency.)

facts.fact: Revenue trajectory within 12 months (from month 3-4).
facts.note: Pre-revenue: 0 orders/payments live (foundation). Business target.

facts.fact: Backend = Django REST API + DRF (decoupled).
facts.note: Production = FastAPI (pyproject 'Vergeo5 FastAPI backend', fastapi>=0.115, 181 files import fastapi, 0 django imports); foundation live 'server: uvicorn', OpenAPI title 'Vergeo5 API'. INTENTIONAL supersession (D18, with written rationale vs Django).

facts.fact: Next.js (React) with SSR for SEO; App Router + RSC.
facts.note: D19 Next.js 15 App Router + SSR/ISR; foundation Vercel customer app healthy. Match (doc says 14+, prod 15).

facts.fact: Vercel (frontend) + Railway/Render (backend ~$7-20/mo).
facts.note: Backend host = OCI Always-Free VM (Docker Compose: FastAPI/Caddy/n8n) per D21; foundation api behind Caddy (via: 1.1 Caddy). Railway/Render NOT used. Vercel frontend correct. Intentional (D21).

facts.fact: Shared backend API + three separate frontend apps (one Django REST API).
facts.note: 3-app topology VERIFIED (D20; foundation 3 Vercel projects). But single API is FastAPI (not Django) and lives under services/api (not /apps/api). Topology match, framework/path conflict.

facts.fact: Claude Code primary, Cursor secondary; Gemini for review (AI Council).
facts.note: CLAUDE.md: Claude architect/reviewer, Cursor implementers. Gemini-review step not evidenced in operating docs. Process, low audit surface.

facts.fact: Supabase real-time for notifications and order tracking.
facts.note: Production notifications = WhatsApp Cloud API (primary) + SMS AfricasTalking + email Resend via outbox/dispatcher (D15; 110 whatsapp files, notifications/adapters/{whatsapp,sms,email}). Supabase Realtime deferred ('Realtime-later' D18). In-app real-time notification center is OUT of v1 (scope fence).

facts.fact: Meilisearch = primary search (self-hosted on Railway).
facts.note: Production search = Postgres FTS + pg_trgm + pgvector + RRF (D22; 17 FTS files, search_documents=288, 0 Meilisearch refs). D22 explicitly 'Meilisearch deferred until >~20k listings / FTS p95 >150ms'. Intentional.

facts.fact: Cloudinary for images (auto-optimization, free tier).
facts.note: D26 Cloudinary public + Supabase Storage private. Foundation: listing_images 134 with cloudinary_public_id LIKE 'demo/%'. Match (+private buckets added).

facts.fact: Redis + CDN layered caching (Upstash Redis free tier).
facts.note: No Redis/Upstash in locked stack or repo (0 refs). Rate limiting via SlowAPI+Caddy (D18). Cloudflare CDN present. Upstash Redis dropped. NOT_AUDITABLE whether any runtime cache is used in prod.

facts.fact: Celery + n8n combined (Celery code-level async).
facts.note: 0 Celery refs in repo. Async handled by FastAPI async + n8n workflows (D18). Celery dropped. Intentional.

facts.fact: Both DPO + Lenco payment gateways (redundancy).
facts.note: Production = Lenco ONLY (70 lenco refs, 0 DPO; lenco service dir + webhooks_lenco.py). D11 'Lenco confirmed, founder has API access'; abstraction seam for others. DPO never integrated. PAYMENT discrepancy -> P0-until-investigated; investigation = intentional single-provider. Residual risk: no gateway redundancy the doc wanted (single point of failure).

facts.fact: Mobile money essential: MTN MoMo + Airtel Money from day one.
facts.note: D11 'all three MoMo rails + cards + bank' via Lenco (+Zamtel collections flagged off). Code present; payments=0 live -> no live MoMo proof (foundation R2). Via Lenco, not DPO.

facts.fact: Settlement within hours -> resolved to 48-hour settlements; build instant payout architecture, activate later.
facts.expected_target: escrow release + payout engine; n8n release-job
facts.note: D5 escrow release on delivery-confirm/48h auto; payout via Lenco (MoMo ~<=5min, bank 24-36h). Payout code + LedgerTemplate.PAYOUT_EXECUTED exist; 0 payouts live; n8n escrow-release workflow (release-job) MISSING on live (foundation R3).

facts.fact: Full escrow — funds held until buyer confirms; use a ledger (not bank sub-accounts).
facts.note: D14 Lenco-held + ledger-of-record. Code VERIFIED: LedgerTemplate {CHARGE_RECEIVED,ESCROW_HOLD,RELEASE_TO_VENDOR,COMMISSION_CAPTURE,COD_COLLECTED,PAYOUT_EXECUTED,CLAWBACK,REFUND_LANE}; post_transaction (37 uses). Runtime unproven (0 ledger txns). R2: prepaid webhook success path may not post CHARGE_RECEIVED/ESCROW_HOLD -> P0 money integrity.

facts.fact: Display any currency, settle in ZMW (exchange-rate API for display).
facts.note: CLAUDE.md: integer ngwee internally, formatK() display, ZMW settlement. Multi-currency display via FX API NOT evidenced/likely out. Settlement-in-ZMW aligned.

facts.fact: Consult tax advisor; below K800K = no mandatory VAT; architect for VAT day one.
facts.note: D13 Turnover Tax launch, ZRA-ready sequential invoicing, per-category VAT flag (off at launch), VSDC seam. invoices/invoice_counters tables exist (0 rows, foundation).

facts.fact: COD under K500 + pay-at-pickup via mobile money for larger.
facts.note: D12 COD <=K500 (cites Master Plan Q25); CLAUDE.md COD <=K500; COD_COLLECTED ledger template present. Note D12/F8 flags founder to confirm cap direction.

facts.fact: Long-term: partner with licensed fintech; don't build payment infra.
facts.note: Business strategy; Lenco aggregator (D11) is consistent direction.

facts.fact: Languages at launch: English + Bemba + Nyanja.
facts.note: D27: LAUNCH English only, expand Bemba/Nyanja (human-reviewed) then French. i18n scaffolding VERIFIED (next-intl). Doc says all three 'at launch'; production launches English-first. Minor scope/timing conflict.

facts.fact: Marketing via local influencers + TikTok/Instagram Reels.
facts.note: Off-platform marketing. No production surface.

facts.fact: Auth: phone OTP (via Africa's Talking) + email + Google/Facebook social login.
facts.note: Production auth = Supabase Auth (phone OTP/email/Google) per foundation. Phone OTP handled by Supabase (not direct Africa's-Talking/django-allauth). Facebook provider NOT evidenced (NOT_AUDITABLE). Phone/email/Google present.

facts.fact: Homepage: hero search + curated collections + categories/logos + trending.
facts.note: merch_slots table (1 row, foundation) + admin merchandising manager (D-scope). Homepage exists (foundation customer app). Detailed layout not re-verified this session.

facts.fact: Smart filters + autocomplete + vector search (pgvector).
facts.note: D22 hybrid; search_documents 288, 17 FTS/pgvector files; supersedes Meilisearch as the engine but delivers the same faceted+semantic UX.

facts.fact: Reviews: verified, multi-dimensional, with photo/video uploads.
facts.note: D-scope: reviews 1-5 star + text + PHOTOS, verified-purchase. MULTI-DIMENSIONAL reviews explicitly OUT of v1 (scope fence). Video NOT_AUDITABLE. reviews table empty (foundation). Verified-purchase + photo in scope; multi-dim deferred = partial conflict.

facts.fact: QR code + PIN code backup (pickup).
facts.note: Code VERIFIED: services/api/app/services/pickup + routers/pickup_verify.py; pickup tokens migration 0017. Runtime unproven (0 orders live).

facts.fact: PWA-first (installable, offline, push).
facts.note: D19 PWA serwist; foundation notes customer PWA installable.

facts.fact: Tiered vendor onboarding: instant basic, 1-3 days verified/premium.
facts.note: D9 3-tier KYC + earned badge. kyc_records table exists (0 rows). Onboarding present; but seller signup CTA broken on customer surface (foundation R1).

facts.fact: Tiered KYC: NRC photo for individuals, PACRA docs for companies.
facts.note: D9 T1 NRC+selfie+MoMo-name-match / T2 PACRA+TPIN / T3 Premium-API. Design VERIFIED; 0 kyc rows live.

facts.fact: Tiered pricing (volume discounts) + RFQ system.
facts.note: D2: Supplies wholesale tier prices + MOQ; Services RFQ. rfq/broadcast + job_quotes present (jobs/quotes 0 rows). B2B gated to verified business (D28).

facts.fact: Progressive analytics: basic free, advanced unlocks with tier.
facts.note: Tied to subscription billing (deferred by D3). Basic vendor analytics in scope; tier-gated advanced deferred.

facts.fact: Product management: manual + CSV bulk + API.
facts.note: D10 CSV import in v1. Manual + CSV in scope; vendor API-integration tier deferred (D3 Gold/API).

facts.fact: Pre-purchase in-platform only; post-purchase contact sharing allowed.
facts.note: Code VERIFIED: services/moderation/contact_strip.py strips direct contacts pre-sale. Runtime enforcement not re-probed.

facts.fact: Comparison view: all vendors side-by-side + sort by nearest.
facts.note: D24 canonical products + 'N vendors selling this' comparison (moat). Data model VERIFIED; nearest-sort (geo) not re-verified.

facts.fact: Tiered vendor profiles (basic/rich/premium).
facts.note: Rich/premium tiering tied to deferred subscriptions (D3). Basic profile + directory in scope (D2).

facts.fact: Shared canonical product images; Product (canonical) + VendorListing (price/stock/condition).
facts.note: D24 Option A locked exactly this. Foundation: products 150, vendor_listings 134, listing_images 134. Data model matches document insight precisely (VERIFIED as design; foundation aggregates).

facts.fact: Delivery: Yango + local couriers (Zampost, private) via aggregation layer.
facts.note: D16 manual admin dispatch; couriers are a label enum (Literal['yango','indrive','other'] in admin_orders.py + admin DispatchPanel). Zampost 0 refs. NO courier API integration v1 (intentional D16). Yango API != Yango label.

facts.fact: All major cities (Lusaka/Ndola/Kitwe/Livingstone/Kabwe); resolved: deliver Lusaka only, pickup everywhere.
facts.note: D16 Lusaka delivery only, nationwide pickup, Copperbelt OUT of v1. delivery_zones=3. Listings nationwide. Matches T4 resolution.

facts.fact: Hybrid delivery: platform-managed small items, vendor-managed large.
facts.note: Manual dispatch model (D16). Small/large split not distinctly evidenced.

facts.fact: No same-day; 1-3 day standard delivery.
facts.note: Scope fence 'no same-day delivery promises' (aligned). SLA copy not re-verified.

facts.fact: Pass through delivery-partner tracking (Yango/courier APIs, status webhooks).
facts.note: No courier API v1 (D16); status updates flow manually via WhatsApp/SMS. Intentional supersession.

facts.fact: No returns for MVP; refund-only for faulty/wrong; physical returns v2.
facts.note: Production EXPANDS beyond doc: D17 two lanes (faulty full-refund + change-of-mind vendor-opt-in with restocking fee). returns/refunds tables exist (empty). Production ahead of doc.

facts.fact: All event types (entertainment + conferences + workshops + private).
facts.note: D8 6 event categories; D29 event_type behavioral driver. events/event_instances/ticket_types tables present, 0 rows (foundation).

facts.fact: In-app tickets with dynamic QR (refresh every 60s); requires PWA.
facts.note: Code VERIFIED: tickets/qr.py uses HMAC + 60s (D2 '60s HMAC rotation' + PIN). BUT n8n ticket-issue workflow MISSING on live (foundation R3) -> paid tickets may never issue. Doc placed Events in Phase 2; D2/D29 moved into v1.

facts.fact: Quote-request services model (post-a-job -> providers respond).
facts.note: D2 Services RFQ. rfq/broadcast + jobs/job_quotes present (1 service row; jobs/quotes 0). In v1 (doc placed in Phase 2).

facts.fact: City guides with categories + AI enhancement later.
facts.note: OUT of v1 by decision (scope fence: 'city guides & AI trip planner OUT'). Also foundation R6.

facts.fact: Business directory as first-class navigation tab.
facts.note: D2 directory tab (vendor profiles double as entries). In v1 (doc placed in Phase 2). Live UI not re-probed this session.

facts.fact: Quiet launch: invite-only beta, then public.
facts.note: beta_invites table; public_launch=false live (foundation). Invite gate on.

facts.fact: Referral program: referrer + referee each get K20 credit.
facts.note: OUT of v1 by decision (scope fence). Also foundation R6. Conflict only if business now claims v1 inclusion.

facts.fact: 10,000-25,000 registered customers year 1 (reframed to 1,000 active buyers).
facts.note: profiles=3 (pre-launch). Business target; T3 reframes.

facts.fact: 200-500 vendors year 1.
facts.note: 3 DEMO vendors live (foundation R5); D10 zero committed vendors. Target, not a defect.

facts.fact: Private limited company registered with PACRA.
facts.note: D1 entity exists but annual returns lapsed (founder action F2); company TPIN pending. Not code-auditable.

facts.fact: GDPR-level compliance (resolved: Zambia DPA + GDPR-ready architecture).
facts.note: CLAUDE.md Zambia DPA privacy; audit_log table + RLS everywhere. Security advisor: auth_leaked_password_protection DISABLED (foundation) -> hygiene gap vs GDPR-level claim. Legal certification deferred (T2).

facts.fact: Escalation tiers: automated first, human review for K500+.
facts.note: services/disputes present; disputes table empty. Escalation threshold logic not re-verified.

facts.fact: Solo founder + AI tools (Claude Code + Cursor + n8n; zero headcount).
facts.note: CLAUDE.md operating model matches (Claude architect + Cursor implementers + n8n automation).

facts.fact: Support: WhatsApp + AI chatbot + phone for high-value.
facts.note: WhatsApp present (110 files). AI support chatbot NOT evidenced (Ask Vergeo is product search RAG, not support). Phone support ops-only.

facts.fact: Comprehensive KPIs: GMV + CAC + LTV + NPS + vendor satisfaction.
facts.note: analytics_events/funnel_events tables exist but 0 rows; admin dashboard UI exists (foundation R4). No Vergeo5 Sentry projects. Instrumentation scaffolded, unfed.

facts.fact: n8n automates order processing first.
facts.note: Live n8n = only 2 active (notification dispatch + payment reconciliation crons). order-jobs/release-job/tickets-issue/event-release absent on live though present in repo (18 json). Foundation R3.

facts.fact: AI features: descriptions -> fraud -> pricing (prioritized).
facts.note: D23 Ask Vergeo RAG (ask_* tables empty). AI product descriptions = Phase 2 (doc). Fraud/pricing AI = Phase 3 / not evidenced.

facts.fact: External services: SMS + WhatsApp + Accounting.
facts.note: SMS (AfricasTalking adapter) + WhatsApp + email present. Accounting integration NOT evidenced (NOT_AUDITABLE).

facts.fact: Personalized recommendations = strongest AI advantage.
facts.note: Phase 3 by doc; not in v1. Not a defect.

facts.fact: Virtual try-on / AR in Phase 3.
facts.note: OUT of v1 by decision (scope fence 'voice search & AR').

facts.fact: WhatsApp informal sellers are the biggest competitor (not Jumia).
facts.note: Business insight; drives WhatsApp-native strategy (aligned with D15 WhatsApp-first).

facts.fact: 'Hub of logos' — business discovery + commerce.
facts.note: Directory tab (D2) realizes this. Identity aligned.

facts.fact: Zimbabwe first for expansion.
facts.note: OUT of v1 by decision (scope fence 'cross-border/Zimbabwe').

facts.fact: Seek investment after 1,000+ orders/month traction.
facts.note: Business milestone.

facts.fact: 5-year super-app vision (commerce + payments + logistics + services + events).
facts.note: Long-range vision.

facts.fact: Promoted Listings (auction-based ad slots) — future.
facts.note: OUT of v1 by decision (scope fence 'promoted-listing auctions'). Doc marks 'future'.

facts.fact: Monthly infra ~$62/mo; ~15 months runway; break-even ~4 orders/mo.
facts.note: D6 sets <=$50/mo ceiling (tighter than doc $62). Actual infra spend NOT_AUDITABLE (no billing access). Free tiers exploited (Supabase/Cloudinary/OCI/Vercel).

facts.fact: Contract-first: OpenAPI 3.1 as single source of truth; generate TS types + Pydantic.
facts.note: Foundation: live OpenAPI present, title 'Vergeo5 API' v0.1.0 (not a SHA; version not '3.1' confirmed). packages/types generated from OpenAPI (D20). Contract-first process plausible; single-source-of-truth not live-verified.

facts.fact: AI_CONTEXT.md as persistent memory read first each session.
facts.note: Repo uses CLAUDE.md + docs/plan/00-status.md as persistent memory (no AI_CONTEXT.md). Mechanism renamed; equivalent exists. Cosmetic.

facts.fact: CI/CD gatekeeper: lint + type + test + OpenAPI contract validation must pass or no merge.
facts.note: CI exists but foundation R7: secret-scan/i18n-lint/Lighthouse are continue-on-error (non-blocking); docs vs YAML conflict on deps-audit; branch-protection NOT_AUDITABLE. Gate exists but not fully blocking.

facts.fact: Phase-1 checkout via DPO (MTN MoMo, Airtel, cards) + escrow + 48h settlement; Lenco explicitly NOT in Phase 1.
facts.note: Production inverts this: Lenco is the PRIMARY (and only) gateway from the start (D11); DPO never integrated. Doc's Phase-1/Phase-2 payment sequencing superseded.

facts.fact: Phase 1 excludes Events/ticketing, directory, AI search, quote-request services, Lenco.
facts.note: Production v1 scope (D2/D29/G) INCLUDES Events schema, directory, AI mode (Ask Vergeo), RFQ services, and Lenco-primary. As-built v1 is broader/re-sequenced vs doc's Phase-1. Re-planned via 16-mountains model, not doc's 4-phase/60-day plan.

facts.fact: OTP via Africa's Talking (Phase 1 automation).
facts.note: OTP now via Supabase Auth (D18). Africa's Talking survives as the SMS NOTIFICATION fallback adapter (notifications/adapters/sms.py: AfricasTalking), not the OTP transport. Split from doc's single-use.

facts.fact: Monitoring: Sentry (free) error tracking + Better Uptime.
facts.note: Foundation R4: NO Vergeo5 Sentry projects in org convergeo-w2 (only zed*). Code has Sentry no-op without DSN. UptimeRobot NOT_AUDITABLE. Production largely blind.

facts.fact: 4 phases + 60-day sprint schedule; 'ship in 60 days'.
facts.note: Superseded by D7 + 16-mountains/pebbles/waves methodology (01-mountains.md, 03-waves.md). Timeline & work-breakdown re-planned. Governance, not a defect.

facts.fact: Month-1 targets: 50-100 orders, 75-100 vendors, GMV K10-25K, payment success >90%, order completion >80%.
facts.note: 0 orders/payments; 3 demo vendors; analytics empty (foundation). Not launched under real money — cannot evaluate KPIs.

facts.fact: Payment integration failure risk [HIGH] — manual bank-transfer fallback as backup.
facts.note: Foundation R2/R8: prepaid ledger posting unproven; single provider (Lenco) with no DPO redundancy; no live paid order. Doc's own HIGH risk remains materially open.

facts.fact: Cold start / empty marketplace risk [HIGH]; onboard 75+ real vendors before day 60.
facts.note: Live is a DEMO/seed catalogue: 3 demo vendors, 134 listings, 134 demo/ Cloudinary images, 0 real orders (foundation R5). Real-vendor onboarding blocked partly by broken seller CTA (R1).

facts.fact: Deliver DB schema with all models & migrations (contract-first, CI-validated).
facts.note: Foundation: live applied <=0050 + odd 0052(20260717100303); repo has 0051-0055 (role hook, translation_overrides, service_reviews, service_bookable) NOT applied. Live DB != git tip. Runtime != repo assumptions. P0 area.

facts.fact: Admin panel manages users/roles; GDPR-level access control.
facts.note: Foundation: user_roles RLS-on/0-client-policies (service-role only); migration 0051 role hook NOT applied (manual role provisioning); no admin users/roles CRUD UI (R6). RBAC works manually; identity discrepancy -> P0-until-investigated (investigated: dormant-by-design + manual grants).
